# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import dataclasses
import core.dbt.contracts.publication as publication

def test_public_model_uses_public_node_dependencies_field_name__a1():
    """
    Style/API check from review: PublicModel should expose `public_node_dependencies`
    (not the older `public_dependencies`) as the field storing public node deps.
    """
    PublicModel = publication.PublicModel
    field_names = {f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(PublicModel)}
    assert 'public_node_dependencies' in field_names, 'PublicModel must define a `public_node_dependencies` dataclass field (requested in review).'

def test_public_model_uses_public_node_dependencies_field_name__a2():
    """
    Style/API check from review: PublicModel should expose `public_node_dependencies`
    (not the older `public_dependencies`) as the field storing public node deps.
    """
    PublicModel = publication.PublicModel
    field_names = {f.name for f in dataclasses.fields(PublicModel)}
    assert 'public_dependencies' not in field_names, 'PublicModel must not define the legacy `public_dependencies` field; it should be renamed to `public_node_dependencies`.'

# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import core.dbt.contracts.publication as publication

def test_project_dependency_rename_applied__a1():
    """
    Style regression test for naming change requested in review:
    `DependentProjects` -> `ProjectDependency`.
    """
    assert hasattr(publication, 'ProjectDependency'), 'Expected class `ProjectDependency` to exist in core.dbt.contracts.publication (rename from `DependentProjects`).'

def test_project_dependency_rename_applied__a2():
    """
    Style regression test for naming change requested in review:
    `DependentProjects` -> `ProjectDependency`.
    """
    assert not hasattr(publication, 'DependentProjects'), 'Did not expect legacy class name `DependentProjects` to remain after renaming to `ProjectDependency`.'

# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import pytest

def test_projectdependencies_naming_is_used_in_publication_contracts__a1():
    """
    Style regression test: the review requested renaming the container type to
    `ProjectDependencies` (and related `ProjectDependency`) instead of the prior
    `Dependencies`/`DependentProjects` names.

    This is observable at runtime via module attributes.
    """
    import core.dbt.contracts.publication as pub
    assert hasattr(pub, 'ProjectDependencies'), 'Expected `ProjectDependencies` to be defined in core.dbt.contracts.publication (renamed per review).'

def test_projectdependencies_naming_is_used_in_publication_contracts__a2():
    """
    Style regression test: the review requested renaming the container type to
    `ProjectDependencies` (and related `ProjectDependency`) instead of the prior
    `Dependencies`/`DependentProjects` names.

    This is observable at runtime via module attributes.
    """
    import core.dbt.contracts.publication as pub
    assert hasattr(pub, 'ProjectDependency'), 'Expected `ProjectDependency` to be defined in core.dbt.contracts.publication (renamed per review).'

def test_projectdependencies_naming_is_used_in_publication_contracts__a3():
    """
    Style regression test: the review requested renaming the container type to
    `ProjectDependencies` (and related `ProjectDependency`) instead of the prior
    `Dependencies`/`DependentProjects` names.

    This is observable at runtime via module attributes.
    """
    import core.dbt.contracts.publication as pub
    assert not hasattr(pub, 'Dependencies'), 'Did not expect legacy `Dependencies` to remain after rename to `ProjectDependencies`.'

def test_projectdependencies_naming_is_used_in_publication_contracts__a4():
    """
    Style regression test: the review requested renaming the container type to
    `ProjectDependencies` (and related `ProjectDependency`) instead of the prior
    `Dependencies`/`DependentProjects` names.

    This is observable at runtime via module attributes.
    """
    import core.dbt.contracts.publication as pub
    assert not hasattr(pub, 'DependentProjects'), 'Did not expect legacy `DependentProjects` to remain after rename to `ProjectDependency`.'
